query: this SKILL.md is way too long and bloated, can you trim it down so it uses fewer tokens without losing what it does?

token-diet this prompt for me — it's the system prompt for an agent and I think half of it is filler
can you make my agent instructions more concise? there's a ton of repetition and I want it cheaper to run
I want to optimize this skill for prompt caching — what should I move around so edits don't keep busting the cache?
the agent's replies are super verbose and burning output tokens. how should I rewrite the instructions to make it terse and return diffs instead of whole files?
review my SKILL.md and give me before/after rewrites that shrink it but keep the triggers intact
why is my context window so expensive on every turn? slim down these instructions
here's three SKILL.md files — rank them by how token-wasteful they are and tell me what to fix in each
go through my Claude instructions file and strip the hedging and redundant phrasing to save tokens, but don't touch anything load-bearing
my Express API endpoint is returning a 500 on the /users route, can you help me debug it?
refactor this Python module to be cleaner and split the 800-line file into smaller ones
TestParseConfig is failing with a nil pointer panic, fix it
my LLM app is hitting the model's context limit at runtime — how do I budget tokens and truncate the conversation history in code?
write me a new skill that scans dependencies for CVEs
proofread this blog post and tighten the prose, it's too wordy
run skilllint on my skill and tell me if the frontmatter is valid
design a rate limiter for our public API that's cluster-aware across 6 instances

my React component re-renders too often and feels slow, can you optimize it?
